description: Monitor Kong Gateway health, performance and traffic using metrics exposed by Kong's Prometheus plugin (Kong 3.x). Covers request rates, latency percentiles (request / upstream / kong processing), status code distribution, bandwidth, connections and resource usage.
title: Kong Gateway Monitoring Dashboard

service.name: service
service.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'service') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v2 WHERE metric_name='kong_http_requests_total' AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN (SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v2 WHERE metric_name='kong_http_requests_total' AND timestamp_ms>toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE)*1000)

widgets.description: Total HTTP requests handled by Kong since start.
widgets.title: Total Requests

widgets.description: Current HTTP request rate across selected services.
widgets.title: Request Rate (req/s)

widgets.description: Nginx worker connections currently in active state.
widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Rate of 5xx responses across selected services.
widgets.title: 5xx Error Rate (req/s)

widgets.description: HTTP request rate broken down by Kong service.
widgets.title: Request Rate by Service

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by HTTP response code.
widgets.title: Response Status Code Distribution

widgets.description: End-to-end request latency (P50 / P95 / P99) as seen by Kong.
widgets.title: Request Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: Latency spent waiting on upstream services (P50 / P95 / P99).
widgets.title: Upstream Latency Percentiles

widgets.description: Time spent inside Kong itself (plugins, routing) excluding upstream.
widgets.title: Kong Processing Latency (P50 / P99)

widgets.description: Bytes received by Kong from clients.
widgets.title: Ingress Bandwidth

widgets.description: Bytes sent by Kong to clients.
widgets.title: Egress Bandwidth

widgets.description: Worker connections grouped by state (active, waiting, reading, writing).
widgets.title: Nginx Connections by State

widgets.description: Memory used by Kong's Lua VMs, grouped by node.
widgets.title: Lua VM Memory by Node
